languages.text: "В таком случае... Приступаю к протоколу 17.88". {n}Альва-9 одним движением достает угрожающего вида боевое устройство и подает его вам.{/n}
"In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: "В таком случае... Приступаю к протоколу 17.88". {n}Альва-9 одним движением достает угрожающего вида боевое устройство и подает его вам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}
"In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}
"In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 draws a long, flat blade from its sheath and hands it to you.{/n}
"In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}
"In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}

languages.text: 「そうであれば…手順17.88に進む」{n}アルバ-9は一連の動作で、鞘から長い平らな刃を取り出し、あなたに渡す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 draws a long, flat blade from its sheath and hands it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「そうであれば…手順17.88に進む。」{n}アルバ-9は一連の動作で、鞘から長い平らな刃を取り出し、あなたに渡す。{/n}

languages.text: «En ese caso... procedo a ejecutar el protocolo 17.88». {n}Con un movimiento fluido, Alva-9 saca un dispositivo de combate de aspecto formidable y te lo entrega.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «En ese caso... procedo a ejecutar el protocolo 17.88». {n}Con un movimiento fluido, Alva-9 saca un dispositivo de combate de aspecto formidable y te lo entrega.{/n}

languages.text: “既然如此……开始执行17.88协议。”{n}阿尔瓦-9动作敏捷地取出一件看起来威力巨大的战斗装置，将其递给了你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “既然如此……开始执行17.88协议。”{n}阿尔瓦-9动作敏捷地取出一件看起来威力巨大的战斗装置，将其递给了你。{/n}

languages.text: "Wenn das so ist ... Fahre fort mir Protokoll 17.88." {n}Mit einer flüssigen Bewegung holt Alva-9 ein bemerkenswertes Kampfgerät hervor und reicht es dir.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wenn das so ist ... Fahre fort mir Protokoll 17.88." {n}Mit einer flüssigen Bewegung holt Alva-9 ein bemerkenswertes Kampfgerät hervor und reicht es dir.{/n}

languages.text: "O hâlde... Protokol 17.88'e geçiliyor." {n}Alva-9, oldukça ürkütücü görünümlü bir savaş cihazını çıkarıp sana uzatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "O hâlde... Protokol 17.88'e geçiliyor." {n}Alva-9, oldukça ürkütücü görünümlü bir savaş cihazını çıkarıp sana uzatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Dans ce cas… Exécution du protocole 17.88. » {n}D'un seul mouvement fluide, Alva-9 sort ce qui ressemble à un appareil de combat aux proportions impressionnantes et vous le tend.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In that case... Proceeding to Protocol 17.88." {n}In a single motion, Alva-9 takes out some kind of formidable-looking combat device and hands it to you.{/n}
